purpose: Assesses where AI stands in the multi-stage process from task-level gains to aggregate TFP acceleration
components: Gate 1: Task-level productivity gains (cleared — demonstrable AI task acceleration)
Gate 2: Firm-level productivity gains (in progress — 15-25% of firms showing measurable gains)
Gate 3: Sectoral diffusion and competitive reallocation (not started)
Gate 4: Aggregate TFP acceleration visible in macro data (not started)
current_assessment: Gate 1 cleared, Gate 2 in progress at 15-25% of firms, Gates 3-4 not started. Aggregate TFP visibility requires all four gates to clear sequentially.
limitations: Assumes sequential progression when some parallelism may exist
Does not account for AI's potential to accelerate its own diffusion (recursive reorganization)
Historical base rates drawn from structurally different GPTs
